title: Building Multi-Agent Teams with CrewAI
modules: Why Multi-Agent Systems Outperform Single Agents
CrewAI Architecture: Agents, Tasks, and Crews
Designing Agent Roles and Delegation Hierarchies
Connecting Tools, APIs, and External Data Sources
Testing, Debugging, and Observing Agent Behavior
Apply It: Build a Crew for Your Own Use Case
Scaling, Cost Control, and Production Readiness
synopsis: Multi-agent frameworks let professionals decompose complex, multi-step problems into coordinated AI workflows that no single model can handle alone. This course teaches you to design, build, and deploy CrewAI-powered agent teams — from role architecture to production-grade orchestration.
rationale: As agentic AI moves from demos to production, professionals who can architect multi-agent systems will hold a decisive advantage over those limited to single-model prompting.
learning_outcome: Design and deploy a functional CrewAI multi-agent workflow tailored to a real task in your own professional domain.
